property_history.description: Property sold for $1,285,000 after 18.25 years of continuous business use. Owner aged 58, retiring.

properties.notes:
Business property held for over 15 years as active asset. Qualifies for small business 15-year exemption.

**Timeline:**
- 1 Jul 2006 to 30 Sep 2024: Business use (café) - 18.25 years
- Continuous active asset of small business
- Owner aged 58 at sale (over 55)
- Retiring and permanently ceasing business

**Key Conditions Met:**
- Active asset of small business for > 15 years
- Owner over 55 years old at time of CGT event
- Retiring and permanently ceasing business
- Satisfies basic conditions (CGT small business entity)
- **NO CGT PAYABLE** - Full exemption under 15-year rule

**Expected Result:**
- NO CGT PAYABLE - Small business 15-year exemption (Subdivision 152-B)
- Total capital gain (before exemption): $806,975
- Full exemption - no CGT payable

**ATO Rules Applied:**
- Subdivision 152-B ITAA 1997 (Small Business 15-Year Exemption)
- Section 152-10 (Basic conditions for relief)
- Active asset held for at least 15 years
- Owner 55+ and retiring
- CGT proceeds exempt (no limit on exemption amount)

user_query: Property at 234 Commercial Road, Newstead QLD 4006, business property held 18 years, owner 58 retiring

additional_info.expected_outcome: NO CGT PAYABLE - Small business 15-year exemption applies (Subdivision 152-B ITAA 1997)
